title: Soil Sample
desc: Samples from 4–6 spots. Tells us nutrients, deficiencies, and pH balance.
value: Lets us build a custom plan instead of guessing. Better soil = thicker grass, better color, fewer problems.

title: Grub & Armyworm Prevention
desc: Targets grubs and armyworms at larva stage before they hatch and feed in fall.
value: Protects your lawn from below-ground damage you won't see until it's too late.

title: Core Aeration (Warm Season)
desc: 2–4" plugs pulled to loosen compacted soil. Leave plugs on lawn to decompose.
value: Lets water, air, and nutrients reach the roots. Stronger roots = thicker, healthier turf.

title: Aeration + Overseeding (Fescue)
desc: Aerate + plant new tall fescue seed. Fills thin areas, improves thickness.
value: Fall is the ideal window for fescue seed. Aeration gives perfect seed-to-soil contact.

title: Mosquito Control
desc: Targets mosquitoes as they hatch. Reduces activity in outdoor spaces.
value: Makes your backyard actually enjoyable again.

title: Fire Ant Prevention
desc: Eliminates colonies at the source. Up to 12 months protection. Targets the queen.
value: Works gradually and targets the source — not just the visible ants.

title: Flea & Tick Prevention
desc: Reduces fleas and ticks in grass and shaded areas. Contact kill + residual prevention.
value: Creates a protective barrier — safer for pets and family.

title: Perimeter Pest Prevention
desc: Applied around foundation. Stops crawling pests from entering the home.
value: Keeps bugs outside where they belong.

title: Garden Bed Weed Prevention
desc: Creates a barrier in garden beds to prevent weed seeds from sprouting.
value: Keeps your beds clean without hand-pulling.

title: Growth Regulator (Bermuda/Zoysia)
desc: Slows top growth, strengthens roots. Denser turf, better color, less mowing.
value: Your lawn looks better AND you mow less. Win-win.
